name: Seth
oracleText:
Whenever another nontoken creature you control dies, scry 1.
At the beginning of your end step, if a creature you controlled died this turn, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.
flavorText: "For God, said she, hath appointed me another seed instead of Abel, whom Cain slew." — Genesis 4:25

image.artist: anonymous printmaker after Hans Sebald Beham

notes: Early World secondary figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Seth met zijn vrouw en kinderen.
title: Seed of Renewal

classics.artist: anonymous printmaker after Hans Sebald Beham
